_meta.description: Global Economic Dashboard data — refreshed April 2026. Sources: IMF WEO Apr 2026, ILO ILOSTAT, BIS, World Bank, national statistics offices. Coverage: 197 countries/territories.

mwUSD.label: Monthly Minimum Wage (USD)
mwUSD.source: ILO ILOSTAT; national labour ministries; IMF FX rates Apr 2026

intr.label: Central Bank Policy Rate
intr.source: BIS central-bank policy rates; national central banks (April 2026)

unemp.label: Unemployment Rate
unemp.source: ILO modelled estimates (ILOEST); IMF WEO April 2026

avgW.label: Average Monthly Wage (USD)
avgW.source: ILO Global Wage Report 2024/25; national statistics offices

gdpPc.label: GDP per Capita (Nominal USD)
gdpPc.source: IMF World Economic Outlook, April 2026 (2025 estimates)

nomGDP.label: Nominal GDP
nomGDP.source: IMF World Economic Outlook, April 2026 (2025 estimates)
